                                                                                5. Haven Flannelette Print Sheet Set Range

                                                                                null Months interest free finance is available for purchases. More finance options  available here

                                                                                The weekly amounts are a guide only. The weekly payment amount above are calculated by spreading the amount financed over the term of the loan. The actual minimum monthly payments are 3% of the outstanding balance or $20, whichever is more. On expiry of the interest free term, the finance companies prevailing interest rate will apply to any outstanding balance.

                                                                                E-mail a Friend

                                                                                Haven Flannelette Print Sheet Set Range

                                                                                Haven
                                                                                $59.00 - $89.00
                                                                                or 4 payments interest free with 

                                                                                Shop Now. Pay later.
                                                                                Always Interest-free.

                                                                                Add your favorites to cart

                                                                                 

                                                                                Select afterpay at checkout

                                                                                 

                                                                                Log into or create your afterpay account, instant approval decision

                                                                                Your purchase will be split into 4 payments, payable every 2 weeks

                                                                                All you need to apply is to have a debit or credit card, to be over 18 years of age, and to be a resident of New Zealand

                                                                                Late fees and additional eligibility criteria apply. The first payment may be due at the time of purchase.
                                                                                For complete terms visit https://www.afterpay.com/en-NZ/terms-of-service

                                                                                Select an item above to purchase

                                                                                DELIVERED TO YOU in 5 working days, $7View Details

                                                                                COLLECT IN STORE in 5 working days, $3View Details

                                                                                PRODUCT DESCRIPTION:
                                                                                Add winter warmth with our Haven Flannelette range. Crafted from 100% Cotton with a brushed finish on both sides for extra softness and a cosy night's sleep.

                                                                                CARE INSTRUCTIONS
                                                                                Fabric may pill.
                                                                                Shrinkage may occur.
                                                                                Wash separately before first use.
                                                                                Wash with similar colours.
                                                                                Wash dark colours separately.
                                                                                Cold gentle machine wash (30°C).
                                                                                Do not bleach.
                                                                                Line dry in shade.
                                                                                Do not tumble dry.
                                                                                Warm iron on reverse if required.
                                                                                Do not iron on print.
                                                                                Do not dryclean.
                                                                                • Queen
                                                                                • 1 x flat sheet 268x278cm; 1 x fitted sheet 162x214+41cm; 2 x Pillowcases 52x77cm; +15cm; flap
                                                                                • 100% Cotton
                                                                                • 170gsm
                                                                                • Machine Washable (Wash prior to first use)
                                                                                • Free From Harmful Chemicals - Oeko Tex Certified
                                                                                • Generously sized to allow for shrinkage
                                                                                • Made in India
                                                                                •  
                                                                                •  
                                                                                ...Read More
                                                                                7002806A
                                                                                RETURNS INFO:

                                                                                Small items purchased online can be returned to any of our physical stores, or you can use the returns sticker included with your order to return it by post free of charge. For large items please call us on 0800 327 637.


                                                                                If the item is faulty or damaged we will meet our obligations under the Consumer Guarantees Act. If you are returning the item because you've changed your mind and the item is in its original condition, then we will exchange the item (physical stores only) or give you a gift card. We do not allow returns for beds, furniture, whiteware and electronics unless the goods are faulty.

                                                                                Read our full return policy here
                                                                                DELIVERY INFO:
                                                                                View Delivery Info Here

                                                                                      Bed Sheets & Pillowcases Size Guide

                                                                                      The sizes provided are an indication only and may vary between each brand and range.

                                                                                      Please refer to the product page for exact measurements.

                                                                                      FITTED SHEETS
                                                                                      Size Dimensions (W x L + D)
                                                                                      Single 91 x 203 + 40-50 cm 36 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      King Single 107 x 203 + 40-50 cm 42 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      Double 138 x 203 + 40-50 cm 54 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      Queen 153 x 203 + 40-50 cm 60 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      King 167 x 203 + 40-50 cm 66 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      Super King 183 x 203 + 40-50 cm 72 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      California King 203 x 203 + 40-50 cm 80 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      FLAT SHEETS: 40CM DROP
                                                                                      Size Dimensions (W x L)
                                                                                      Single 180 x 265 cm 71 x 104"
                                                                                      King Single 200 x 265 cm 79 x 104"
                                                                                      Double 220 x 265 cm 87 x 104"
                                                                                      Queen 240 x 265 cm 94 x 104"
                                                                                      King 275 x 265 cm 108 x 104"
                                                                                      Super King 290 x 265 cm 114 x 104"
                                                                                      California King 310 x 265 cm 122 x 104"
                                                                                      FLAT SHEETS: 50CM DROP
                                                                                      Size Dimensions (W x L)
                                                                                      Single 191 x 250 cm 75 x 98"
                                                                                      King Single 207 x 265 cm 81 x 104"
                                                                                      Double 257 x 265 cm 101 x 104"
                                                                                      Queen 270 x 265 cm 106 x 104"
                                                                                      King 285 x 265 cm 112 x 104"
                                                                                      Super King 300 x 265 cm 118 x 104"
                                                                                      California King 320 x 265 cm 126 x 104"
                                                                                      PILLOWCASES
                                                                                      Size Dimensions (W x L)
                                                                                      Standard 48 x 73 cm 19 x 29"
                                                                                      King 52 x 75 cm 20 x 30"
                                                                                      European 65 x 65 cm 26 x 26"
                                                                                      Lodge 52 x 92 cm 20 x 36"
                                                                                      Triangle 74 x 74 cm 29 x 29"

                                                                                      Double 137 x 203 + 40-50 cm 54 x 80 + 16-20"
                                                                                      Queen 152 x 203 + 40-50 cm 660 x 80 + 16-20"

                                                                                      FLAT SHEETS
                                                                                      Size Dimensions (W x L)
                                                                                      Single 180 x 260 cm 71 x 102"
                                                                                      Double 230 x 260 cm 91 x 102"
                                                                                      Queen 245 x 260 cm 96 x 102"
                                                                                      King 275 x 260 cm 108 x 102"
                                                                                      Super King 285 x 260 cm 112 x 102"
                                                                                      PILLOWCASES
                                                                                      Size Dimensions (W x L)
                                                                                      Standard 50 x 70-75 cm 20 x 28-30"
                                                                                      European 65 x 65 cm 26 x 26"

                                                                                      Sheets can be bought individually or as part of a sheet set range. In most cases, Single and King Single sheet sets include a flat sheet, fitted sheet and one pillowcase. Larger sizes, including Double, Queen, King, Super King and Californian King consist of a flat sheet, fitted sheet and two pillowcases. Please check the product detail page for more information.

                                                                                      The drop for sheets refers to the depth, at Farmers we offer 40cm and 50cm options. For beds with larger depth mattresses, we recommend choosing sheets with a 50cm drop.
